title: Smart Decentralized Solar Energy Management
shortDescription: ESP32-based decentralized energy nodes maximizing solar capture via automated tracking.
problem: Centralized solar grids suffer from massive transmission losses and lack localized optimization. When a single central inverter fails, entire residential blocks lose power generation capability.
solution: We designed an ESP32-based decentralized node system capable of independently tracking solar vectors and directly routing power to localized batteries, reducing transmission loss by 18%.
howItWorks: Dual-Axis Actuation: Built and tested the stepper motor assembly for the solar cradle.
Node Connectivity: Programmed the ESP32 to publish localized telemetry to an MQTT broker.
Grid Integration Simulator: Connecting multiple nodes together to simulate dynamic power diversion.

title: Drone-Based AQI Monitoring
shortDescription: Geo-tagged 3D environmental mapping using customized hexacopters.
problem: Standard AQI stations are static and remain at ground level, severely limiting analysis of vertical pollution distribution and failing to track transient smog clouds.
solution: A custom hexacopter carrying particulate and gas payload sensors that flies automated 3D grid patterns to generate volumetric models of local air pollution.
howItWorks: Hexacopter Assembly: Calibrated the flight controller and balanced the drone frame.
Sensor Suite Integration: I2C based multiplexing for 5 unique gas and particulate sensors.
Automated Survey Flights: Autonomous way-point surveying over industrial boundaries.
3D Topographic Modeling: Translating telemetry logs into a live dashboard mesh.

title: Audio Guidance for Visually Impaired
shortDescription: Smart Glasses featuring YOLO spatial detection and <200ms low-latency audio feedback.
problem: Traditional walking canes only detect objects immediately on the ground constraint to arm's length, failing to warn users of overhead obstacles or distant approaching hazards.
solution: A wearable 'Smart Glasses' frame computing depth and object recognition live, conveying spatial coordinates directly as spatial audio pings to the user via bone-conduction.
howItWorks: Machine Learning Pipeline: Compressed YOLOv8 execution to hit 30FPS on edge computing.
Hardware Miniaturization: Designed a custom PCB allowing the rig to fit within a standard sunglass arm.
Clinical Trials: Partnering with local NGOs for real-world usability testing.

title: Sign Language to Vocalizer
shortDescription: Wearable flex-sensor glove paired with a gesture-to-speech ML model.
problem: Communication barriers exist between sign language users and non-signers in dynamic public spaces requiring immediate interactions (e.g. at a grocery store checkout).
solution: A lightweight glove tracking finger bend mapping to a neural network that translates gestures into real-time synthesized speech via a paired mobile application.
howItWorks: IMU + Flex Calibration: Reliable data streaming of raw finger curl and wrist pitch coordinates.
Model Training: Gathering gesture datasets for 50 common ASL words.
Mobile App V1: Deploying the vocalizer text-to-speech companion app.

title: IoT Water Monitoring & Segregation
shortDescription: Real-time pH/TDS sensing driving heavy-duty automated solenoid valves.
problem: Campus wastewater and rainwater are often improperly mixed, leading to chemical contamination of natural runoff systems.
solution: An automated pipeline junction featuring embedded probes calculating contamination vectors, actively diverting clean water to groundskeeping and contaminated water to filtration.
howItWorks: Valve Automation: Successfully driving 12V high-pressure solenoid valves via solid-state relays.
Sensor Calibration: Calibrating analog pH readings against chemical buffer solutions.
Dashboard Telemetry: Building a Node-RED interface for campus maintenance crews.

title: Food Redistribution Platform
shortDescription: A mobile/web platform connecting food donors (restaurants, households) with NGOs and individuals. Reduces food waste and hunger.
problem: Large quantities of food are wasted daily while many people lack access to meals.
solution: A mobile/web platform connecting food donors (restaurants, households) with NGOs and individuals.
howItWorks: Problem Research & Scoping: Identifying the core issue and surveying the target demographic for potential solutions.
Prototyping & Development: Building the initial version or minimal viable product to test core hypotheses.
Field Testing & Deployment: Rolling out the solution to real users and tracking measurable impact.
